name: account-ai-for-tally
description: Account AI for Tally — a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects Claude and other AI assistants to Tally Prime accounting software.

scripts.build:binary: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/main.mts --compile --outfile dist-bin/account-ai-for-tally
scripts.build:binary:win: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/main.mts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist-bin/account-ai-for-tally-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:binary:mac-arm: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/main.mts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist-bin/account-ai-for-tally-mac-arm64
scripts.build:binary:mac-x64: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/main.mts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist-bin/account-ai-for-tally-mac-x64
scripts.build:binary:all: npm run build:binary:win && npm run build:binary:mac-arm && npm run build:binary:mac-x64

author: Arihant Daga
